sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel movement not documented

special_mechanics.name: Cursor Grid Rotation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a cursor on a rectangular grid used to rotate individual lines in a manner similar to a Rubik's Cube. Rows or columns of matching cookies are cleared when complete.

special_mechanics.name: Wild Card Cookie
special_mechanics.description: A sixth cookie type shaped like Yoshi's head occasionally appears and acts as a wild card to help clear lines of any other cookie type.

special_mechanics.name: Grid Expansion
special_mechanics.description: The grid grows in size from cookies entering from the top and right sides of the playing field. Game over occurs when the grid overflows.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Yoshi's Cookie is a tile-matching puzzle game. No documented player character physics, gravity, or jump mechanics exist as this is a puzzle game with cursor-based grid manipulation rather than character movement platforming. All movement/physics values are not applicable to the game's mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Yoshi's Cookie (SNES)
